title: Fix calendar +N more click handler
description:
In the calendar month view, when a day has more events than can display, the '+N more' label opens a new event form instead of expanding to show the hidden events. Fix the click handler to show the hidden events in a popover or expanded view.

Acceptance criteria:
- Clicking '+N more' shows the hidden events for that day
- Does not open the new event form
- Hidden events are interactive (clickable to view/edit)

Dev Lead.notes: Clean fix. stopPropagation prevents bubble to onDayClick. Expand/collapse state per cell. All events retain click handlers.
